prompts.title: LinkedIn Post: SDVOSB Advantage
prompts.prompt: Create a compelling LinkedIn post explaining the advantages of SDVOSB certification for government contractors. Include: (1) Direct access to $25B+ in federal set-aside contracts, (2) Competitive advantages in federal bidding, (3) Real business growth impact. Write in professional but engaging tone. Include relevant hashtags.
prompts.example_output: 📢 Did you know? 🎯 SDVOSB certification unlocks direct access to $25B+ in federal set-asides. Here's what that means for your bottom line...

prompts.title: Twitter Thread: GovCon Tips
prompts.prompt: Create a 5-tweet thread with actionable government contracting tips. Each tweet should: (1) Start with a number or emoji, (2) Deliver one clear tip, (3) Be under 280 characters, (4) End with a hook to read the next tweet.
prompts.example_output:
🧵 5 GovCon Tactics Government Contractors Don't Know About:

1️⃣ The 8(a) Program...

prompts.title: Email Newsletter: Monthly Market Update
prompts.prompt: Write an engaging monthly email newsletter for government contractors. Include: (1) Top 3 market opportunities this month, (2) Upcoming contract deadlines, (3) Quick tip section, (4) Call-to-action. Keep it scannable with bullet points.
prompts.example_output:
Subject: 3 New GovCon Opportunities This Month + Market Trends

Hi [Name],...

prompts.title: LinkedIn Article: Deep Dive Guide
prompts.prompt: Write a comprehensive LinkedIn Article (1500+ words) about a government contracting topic. Include: (1) Current market context, (2) Step-by-step guidance, (3) Real examples, (4) Resources, (5) Action items. Make it authoritative and practical.
prompts.example_output: The Complete Guide to CMMC Compliance: What Government Contractors Need to Know in 2026...

prompts.title: Case Study: Success Story
prompts.prompt: Write a compelling case study showing how a contractor won a federal contract. Include: (1) Challenge faced, (2) Your solution, (3) Results with numbers, (4) Key lessons, (5) Specific tactic that worked.
prompts.example_output: How We Grew from 0-$2M in Federal Contracts in 12 Months: What We Learned...

prompts.title: Industry News Commentary
prompts.prompt: Write a post commenting on recent government contracting news. Include: (1) What happened, (2) Why it matters, (3) Impact on contractors, (4) How to prepare/capitalize. Keep opinion balanced but clear.
prompts.example_output: The new CMMC 2.0 requirements just dropped, and here's what contractors need to know...

prompts.title: How-To Content: Quick Tip
prompts.prompt: Write a single, actionable 'how-to' post on a government contracting process. Format: 'How to [specific task]' + one clear step + benefit. Make it shareable and practical.
prompts.example_output: How to respond to a GSA Schedule RFQ in 3 hours: Focus on these 3 pages of the IFB first...

prompts.title: Event Announcement: Webinar/Roundtable
prompts.prompt: Write an announcement for a webinar or roundtable discussion. Include: (1) Catchy hook, (2) Problem you're solving, (3) Speaker credentials, (4) Key topics covered, (5) Clear registration link or CTA.
prompts.example_output: LIVE WEBINAR: 5 Government Contractors Share How They Won $5M+ in Federal Contracts...
